content.json:
# SpyCloud Compass Dashboard
**Infostealer & Device Intelligence** - Monitor infected devices, compromised applications, and malware-exfiltrated data from SpyCloud Compass.

> This workbook covers SpyCloudCompassData_CL, SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL, and SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL tables.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudCompassData_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Compass Records", 0, 1, "Infected Devices", 0, 2, "Compromised Apps", 0, 3, "Affected Users", 0, 4]),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Compass Records", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Label="Infected Devices", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(target_domain) | extend Label="Compromised Apps", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Affected Users", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Compass Overview

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize Users=dcount(email), Domains=dcount(target_domain), MaxSeverity=max(severity), LatestSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by tostring(infected_machine_id), tostring(user_hostname)
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 25 by MaxSeverity desc, Users desc
| project DeviceID=infected_machine_id, Hostname=user_hostname, RiskLevel, AffectedUsers=Users, CompromisedDomains=Domains, LatestSeen)
content.title: Top 25 Infected Devices

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(target_domain)
| summarize StolenCredentials=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), UniqueDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by tostring(target_domain)
| order by StolenCredentials desc
| take 20)
content.title: Top 20 Compromised Applications by Stolen Credentials

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize InfectedDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id), AffectedUsers=dcount(email) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Compass Infection Trend (Daily)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(user_os)
| summarize DeviceCount=dcount(infected_machine_id) by tostring(user_os))
content.title: Infected Device OS Distribution
